title: Geese’s Emily Green Makes Runway Debut In Givenchy
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
It's Paris Fashion Week, and Geesemania is international. Last night the Brooklyn band's guitarist Emily Green made her runway debut at the Givenchy Fall 2026 Ready-To-Wear Show at the Chateau de Vincennes.

The post Geese’s Emily Green Makes Runway Debut In Givenchy appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
It's Paris Fashion Week, and Geesemania is international. Last night the Brooklyn band's guitarist Emily Green made her runway debut at the Givenchy Fall 2026 Ready-To-Wear Show at the Chateau de Vincennes.

Sarah Burton served as Creative Director, and Rooney Mara, Elizabeth Olsen, and Diane Kruger were among those in attendance. Green performed a catwalk amongst models Alex Consani and Mona Tougaard, as well as French novelist Constance Debré and performer and sculptor Isabelle Albuquerque.

Later that night Geese played a show at Paris' Le Bataclan. A week ago, Geese won their first award, taking home a BRIT trophy for International Group Of The Year. Drummer Max Bassin accepted it, proclaiming, "Free Palestine, fuck ICE, R.I.P. Mani, let's go Geese!" and promptly getting censored by ITV.
